---
title: "2a: Metadata De-duplication Report"
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the metadata de-duplication step, which removes duplicate genome entries based on `biosample_accession` before Mash filtration.

## Input Summary

```{python}
import pandas as pd

input_summary = pd.read_csv("../temp/1b_genome_summary.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})
input_metadata = pd.read_csv("../temp/1b_genome_metadata.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})
print(f"Input genomes (from 1b): {input_summary.shape[0]}")
```

## De-duplication Results

```{python}
dedup_summary = pd.read_csv("../temp/2a_genome_summary.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})
dedup_metadata = pd.read_csv("../temp/2a_genome_metadata.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})

n_removed = input_metadata.shape[0] - dedup_metadata.shape[0]
print(f"Duplicates removed: {n_removed}")
print(f"Genomes after de-duplication: {dedup_summary.shape[0]}")
```
